projects.name: ClaudioOS
projects.handoff_excerpt: RTL8168 wired-ethernet driver runs on real HW. Link up at 1000M, TX works, RX blocked. DHCP times out because chip fires zero RX interrupts / doesn't deliver frames. Likely needs chip-variant-specific init (Linux r8169-style CPlusCmd + Config regs).
milestones_hit: RTL8168 driver TX path live on real hardware at 1000M
blockers: RTL8168 RX path blocked — chip fires zero RX interrupts; DHCP times out; needs chip-variant init

projects.name: Wraith Browser
projects.handoff_excerpt: Hosted Corpo API live at https://wraith-browser.vercel.app (Vercel TLS-proxied) and http://207.244.232.227:8080 (direct). Open AGPL repo + proprietary api-server tier both deploying clean. Growth-prep artifacts staged. FR queue cleared except for cross-repo FR-4.
milestones_hit: Hosted Corpo API live on Vercel + VPS
blockers: BR-3: exposed GitHub PAT awaiting rotation (Matt-action)
FR-4 blocked on ClaudioOS session for HttpTransport vendoring

projects.name: Kalshi Trader v7 (Pixie Dust)
projects.handoff_excerpt: No HANDOFF.md present. Today's commits: v7.10.0 release with signed installer, brain pre-filter + auto-gate + weather YES gate + polymarket persistence; polymarket .us heartbeat + IPv4 force fix for VPS ENETUNREACH; proposer prompt rewrite to undo systematic NO bias.
milestones_hit: Polymarket .us heartbeat + telegram notifier deployed to VPS
Brain prompt v3 disambiguates data evidence from allowlist

projects.name: Job Hunter MCP
projects.handoff_excerpt: Sniper mode active. Orchestrator live (30min poll + 2h scrape). ~5,746 applications submitted historically; ~33,000+ jobs tracked. DO NOT mass-apply. Open question from prior session: Priyasha S. client-call status.
blockers: Open Q: Priyasha S. client call outcome (Matt handled manually)

projects.name: The Right Wire
projects.handoff_excerpt: Site healthy after longest session of the project. Audit harness fully green (64 ok / 0 fail). All sidecar-driven crons run through Claude Code OAuth (zero claude.ai chat clutter). Real live market data flowing into Intel dashboards. CNC scraper recovered from Twitter API restructure, ingests ~790 tweets/run. First promotional tweet under @therightwireai went live with war-room map image.
milestones_hit: Claude Code OAuth swap shipped (sidecar zero-chat-clutter)
Twitter API restructure recovery — scrape green, ~790 tweets/run
Real live market data flowing into Intel dashboards (Yahoo Finance swap)
First promotional tweet under @therightwireai went live

projects.name: PerformanceTracker
projects.handoff_excerpt: App launches clean on iPhone 17 Pro Max. Dashboard shows seeded P1/P2/P3 trajectory + live Abacus finance. Revenue tab pulls bank-feed transactions across All Orgs / per-org with 7/30/90/365d window picker. Meal recommender draws from 32 templates. Health data flows on-device via HealthKit; project-status harvested nightly by kokonoe scheduled task.
milestones_hit: App shipping on iPhone 17 Pro Max (live device)
Abacus finance wired into Revenue tab
Health pipeline finalized (on-device HealthKit + nightly kokonoe project harvest)
HealthKit auth abort fixed (xcodegen Info.plist regression)

The Right Wire growth launch — first promotional tweet under @therightwireai with war-room map image
Wraith Browser hosted Corpo API live at https://wraith-browser.vercel.app (Vercel TLS-proxied) + 207.244.232.227:8080 direct

notes: Health harvest intentionally omitted — handled on-device by iOS app via HealthKit. Client metrics null because kokonoe routine has no Gmail/Calendar connector. Top project today: The Right Wire (7 commits / 6129 LOC) closely followed by Kalshi Trader v7 (7 commits / 5298 LOC including v7.10.0 release).
